goal: Task 6: update governance and routing assumptions to support a narrow default core.

findings.routingFixtureScope: built-in evaluator fixture uses default-core scenarios only and enforces default-tier routing
findings.breadthBiasedAssumption: removed: implied dynamic coverage is enforced for default-tier only, not for all on-disk skills
findings.untieredPolicy: hard-fail: untiered on-disk skills fail governance
findings.leakagePolicy: hard-fail: default-core fixture tasks routing to manual/dormant/candidate-prune/untiered skills fail governance

enforcement: alias-aware tier mapping (superpowers/* -> leaf alias supported)
default fixture expected skills must be in default tier
default fixture top skill selections must remain in default tier
enabled skills must exist in registry
all on-disk skills must have explicit tier assignment

notes: No additional governance-script code edits were required in this step because current scripts already satisfy the tier-aware narrow-default-core policy.
This summary supersedes ad-hoc narrative evidence and is intended as the canonical Task 6 status artifact.
